- **Description**: (max 155 chars)

- **og:title**:

- **og:image**: (1200x630px)
- **og:type**: website

## Tracking Plan
### GA4 Events
| Evento | Trigger | Parametros |
|--------|---------|------------|
| page_view | Automatico | — |
| scroll_depth | 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% | percent |
| cta_click | Clique em CTA | cta_location, cta_text |
| form_start | Primeiro campo preenchido | form_name |
| form_submit | Envio do formulario | form_name, success |

### Meta Pixel Events
| Evento | Trigger |
|--------|---------|
| PageView | Page load |
| ViewContent | Scroll 50% |
| Lead | Form submit |
